nasb.text: Your carcasses will be food to all birds of the sky and to the beasts of the earth, and there will be no one to frighten them away.

esv.text: And your dead body shall be food for all birds of the air and for the beasts of the earth, and there shall be no one to frighten them away.

cnv.text: 你的屍體必成為空中的飛鳥和地上的走獸的食物；必沒有人來把牠們嚇走。

ccb.text: 你们的尸体要成为飞禽走兽的食物，必无人赶走它们。
